exclude_rationales.AGENTS.md: Assistant and local execution guidance, not public launch copy or product documentation.
exclude_rationales..planning/**: Ignored GSD planning state can contain deliberately quoted forbidden strings from plans, audits, and summaries.
exclude_rationales.docs-internal/**: Private/internal notes are outside the public launch surface.
exclude_rationales..git/**: Git internals are not public source files.
exclude_rationales.**/node_modules/**: Vendored dependency trees are not project-authored public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/dist/**: Generated build output is not source-of-truth public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/build/**: Generated build output is not source-of-truth public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/coverage/**: Generated coverage output is not source-of-truth public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/playwright-report/**: Generated Playwright reports are not source-of-truth public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/test-results/**: Generated test output is not source-of-truth public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/.pytest_cache/**: Generated pytest cache files are not public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/.mypy_cache/**: Generated mypy cache files are not public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/.ruff_cache/**: Generated Ruff cache files are not public copy.
exclude_rationales.**/__pycache__/**: Generated Python bytecode caches are not public copy.
exclude_rationales.package-lock.json: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.frontend/package-lock.json: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.pnpm-lock.yaml: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.yarn.lock: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.uv.lock: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.poetry.lock: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.Pipfile.lock: Lockfiles are machine-generated dependency state, not public launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.png: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.jpg: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.jpeg: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.gif: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.webp: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.ico: Binary assets are not text launch copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.pdf: Binary assets are not source Markdown/YAML/package copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.zip: Archives are generated or packaged artifacts, not source copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.gz: Archives are generated or packaged artifacts, not source copy.
exclude_rationales.**/*.tgz: Archives are generated or packaged artifacts, not source copy.

forbidden.reason: Launch copy should use OSS/self-hosted positioning, not open-core strategy language.
Commercial overlay strategy is not part of the public OSS launch surface.
Enterprise positioning is not announced in public launch copy.
Private extension repository names must not appear in public source surfaces.
Private extension access tokens must not appear in public source surfaces.
Hosted or tenancy strategy language is out of scope for OSS launch copy.
SaaS positioning is out of scope for OSS launch copy.
Cloud edition positioning is out of scope for OSS launch copy.
GeoLens should claim OGC API support, not public certification or compliance status.
Public install copy should route OGC examples through http://localhost:8080/api/collections.
GeoLens ships docker-compose.yml and docker-compose.prod.yml, not geolens.yml.
Fresh installs generate a strong admin password and must not document admin/admin defaults.
